---
name: Question / discussion
about: A design question or scope conversation
title: ""
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

## Question

Be specific. "How should X work?" is better than "Thoughts on X?".

## Context

What you've already considered, ruled out, or learned. Links to BLUEPRINT sections, ADRs, or upstream docs welcome.

## Decision shape

Is this a one-way door (hard to reverse) or a two-way door (cheap to change later)? Useful for deciding how much ceremony the discussion needs.
